clinical.family_history: Father had colorectal cancer at age 72
clinical.previous_treatment: Surgical resection (left hemicolectomy) completed 4 weeks ago
clinical.comorbidities: Type 2 Diabetes (controlled with Metformin 1000mg BID), Hypertension (controlled with Lisinopril 10mg QD)
clinical.current_medications: Metformin 1000mg BID, Lisinopril 10mg QD, Aspirin 81mg QD

KRAS.significance: Pathogenic - predicts resistance to EGFR inhibitors (cetuximab, panitumumab)

APC.significance: Pathogenic - truncating mutation in WNT signaling pathway

expected_recommendations: Adjuvant chemotherapy (CAPOX or FOLFOX) - recommended for Stage IIB with high-risk features
EGFR inhibitors (cetuximab, panitumumab) CONTRAINDICATED - KRAS G12V mutation
Immunotherapy (pembrolizumab) NOT indicated - MSS status (not MSI-H)
Bevacizumab can be considered - anti-VEGF therapy
